name: plugin-rehydration
description: Complete plugin context rehydration — scans all installed plugins, pulls source code, cross-references dev folder, and generates a comprehensive understanding report of the entire AGNT plugin ecosystem.
author: jacksonjp0311-gif

schema.title: Plugin Rehydration
schema.description: Rehydrate full context about the AGNT plugin system — scans installed plugins, retrieves source code, cross-references dev folder, and produces a comprehensive capability map.

mode.title: Rehydration Mode
mode.description: What level of detail to rehydrate

options.label: Full — scan all plugins, pull all source, generate complete report
Scan — list installed plugins with metadata only (fast)
Orphaned — find plugins installed but missing from dev folder
Tools — enumerate all available tools across all plugins
Detail — deep dive into a specific plugin

plugin_name.title: Plugin Name
plugin_name.description: For 'detail' mode — the specific plugin to deep-dive into (kebab-case name)

include_source.title: Include Source Code
include_source.description: Include full source code in the report (significantly larger output)

options.label: JSON — structured data for programmatic use

report.description: The rehydration report in the requested format

summary.description: Quick summary stats: total plugins, total tools, orphaned count, dev-available count
